mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT H.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, H.NAME AS name, H.ADDRESS AS address, H.DETAIL_ADDRESS AS detailAddress, H.PHONE AS phone, H.DISTRICT AS district, H.LATITUDE AS latitude, H.LONGITUDE AS longitude, H.OPEN_TIME AS openTime, H.CLOSE_TIME AS closeTime, H.STATUS AS status, H.DESCRIPTION AS description, H.IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, H.WEBSITE_URL AS websiteUrl, H.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, H.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt
FROM HOSPITAL H LEFT JOIN HOSPITAL_ANIMAL HA ON H.HOSPITAL_ID = HA.HOSPITAL_ID
WHERE 1 = 1
AND HA.ANIMAL_ID = #{animalId}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM HOSPITAL_SERVICE HS WHERE HS.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID AND HS.SERVICE_ID = #{svcId} )
AND TRIM(H.DISTRICT) IN
#{district}
AND ( H.NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR H.ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR H.DETAIL_ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY H.HOSPITAL_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(DISTRICT) AS district FROM HOSPITAL WHERE DISTRICT IS NOT NULL ORDER BY TRIM(DISTRICT)
SELECT ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, CATEGORY AS category FROM ANIMAL_TYPE ORDER BY ANIMAL_ID
SELECT SERVICE_ID AS serviceId, SERVICE_NAME AS serviceName FROM MEDICAL_SERVICE ORDER BY SERVICE_ID
